title: lichen_l2.c:864 lichen_l2_send does not check net_pkt is IPv6
description: Contract violation: lichen_l2_send() - Trusts caller (Zephyr net_l2) to pass an IPv6 packet but does not validate. Line 905 checks pkt_len >= IPV6_BASE_HDR_LEN but does not verify the packet actually contains an IPv6 header (version field = 6). WHY: Malformed packet could be processed, compressed incorrectly, and transmitted. However, L2 contract with Zephyr guarantees IPv6, and checking version would add overhead on every TX. HOW to fix: Optional DEBUG-only check: verify (buf[0] >> 4) == 6 after linearization. Low priority - Zephyr guarantees valid packets.
